findings.issue: User-controlled filename written into upload root
findings.recommended_fix: Generate a server-side upload name, ignore path components from the submitted filename, and store uploads outside public/executable roots rather than writing UPLOAD_ROOT / filename.
Set a concrete audit_log_retention_days value and record upload audit events with actor, object, action, result, and timestamp for that retention period.

findings.issue: Upload type validation relies on filename suffix
findings.recommended_fix: Validate uploads using MIME type, file signature/magic bytes, file size, and allowed extension together instead of relying on filename.endswith alone.
